debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
P : Measure Ω
inst✝⁷ : LinearOrder ι
inst✝⁶ : OrderBot ι
𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ
X : ι → Ω → E
inst✝⁵ : TopologicalSpace ι
inst✝⁴ : OrderTopology ι
inst✝³ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝² : 𝓕.HasUsualConditions P
inst✝¹ : NormedSpace ℝ E
inst✝ : CompleteSpace E
hX :
  @ProbabilityTheory.Locally ι Ω E mΩ inst✝⁷ inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴
    SubtractionMonoid.toSubNegZeroMonoid.toNegZeroClass.toZero
    (fun X => ∀ (ω : Ω) (x : ι), ∃ l, Tendsto (fun x => X x ω) (nhdsWithin x (Set.Iio x)) (nhds l)) 𝓕 X P
⊢ ∀ᵐ (ω : Ω) ∂P, ∀ (x : ι), ∃ l, Tendsto (fun x => X x ω) (nhdsWithin x (Set.Iio x)) (nhds l)

  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := this
  refine ⟨l, ?_⟩
  refine hl.congr' ?_
  filter_upwards [eventually_lt_nhdsWithin x] with y hy
  simp only [stoppedProcess, min_eq_left (le_of_lt (lt_trans (WithTop.coe_lt_coe.mpr hy) hn)),
    Set.indicator_of_mem (Set.mem_setOf.mpr hpos)]

  use l
  have heq : ∀ᶠ y in 𝓝[<] x, stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < hX.localSeq n ω}.indicator (X i)) (hX.localSeq n) y ω = X y ω := by
